ddls:
CREATE TABLE "execution_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "processed_count" INTEGER /* Number of records processed during the execution */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Total execution time in milliseconds */,
  "failure_count" INTEGER /* Count of failed records during execution */,
  "deploy_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the deployment related to this log */,
  "histogram" TEXT /* Histogram data representing execution metrics distribution */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the processing job that generated this log */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the execution (running, completed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message if the execution failed */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of retries attempted for the job */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the job was executed (dev, staging, prod) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES processing_jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_deploy_id FOREIGN KEY ("deploy_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deploy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deploy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "deploy_version" TEXT /* Version of the deployed code */,
  "deploy_date" TEXT /* Date of the deployment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deployment */,
  "deployed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the deployment */,
  "rollback_version" TEXT /* Version to which the deployment can be rolled back */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (successful, failed, rolled back) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deploy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_deployed_by FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing job */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the job */,
  "last_executed" TEXT /* Last executed timestamp of the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (active, inactive) */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Cron-like schedule for the job execution */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the job */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_jobs_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the user belongs */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the execution log being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES execution_logs ("log_id")
)
